description: Style NoteLet the apple of your eye enjoy some style and happiness in this T-shirt from Mr men. Stylized with an interesting graphic and rubber print, team it with shorts and comfy footwear for that super cool lookProduct DetailsYellow t-shirt which has a round ribbed neck, short sleeves with a blue stripe, graphic and rubber print on the front and a blue stripe above the hemMaterial and Care100% CottonMachine wash warm with like colours using a mild detergentUse a non chlorine bleach if neededTumble dry lowCool iron; do not iron on decorationsDo not dry clean
